cookie: PASTE_COOKIE_HERE (getAccounts2 request: Headers tab > Request Headers > Cookie -- the full value)
csrf: PASTE_CSRF_HERE (getAccounts2 request: Payload tab > csrf value)
user_agent: PASTE_USER_AGENT_HERE (getAccounts2 request: Headers tab > Request Headers > user-agent) -- recommended; Cloudflare binds cf_clearance to this plus your IP
